c.d: Maximum file size allowed to be sent for free or within the app's basic plan
Security measures like encryption type (e.g., end-to-end encryption, TLS, AES-256), password protection, and file access controls
Support for multiple operating systems like Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, and web browsers
User-friendliness of the app, including whether registration is required and simplicity of sharing process
Extra functionalities such as collaboration tools, messaging, file preview, multi-device connection, or cloud integration
